Levels.11: Stimulus - Eriksen flanker array '<<<<<' (congruent): central target arrowhead pointing left, flanked on each side by 2 arrowheads pointing left; black arrowheads on gray background, displayed for 200 ms
Levels.12: Stimulus - Eriksen flanker array '>>>>>' (congruent): central target arrowhead pointing right, flanked on each side by 2 arrowheads pointing right; black arrowheads on gray background, displayed for 200 ms
Levels.21: Stimulus - Eriksen flanker array '>><>>' (incongruent): central target arrowhead pointing left, flanked on each side by 2 arrowheads pointing right; black arrowheads on gray background, displayed for 200 ms
Levels.22: Stimulus - Eriksen flanker array '<<><<' (incongruent): central target arrowhead pointing right, flanked on each side by 2 arrowheads pointing left; black arrowheads on gray background, displayed for 200 ms
Levels.111: Response - left hand (correct), congruent flankers ('<<<<<'), target pointing left
Levels.112: Response - left hand (error), congruent flankers ('>>>>>'), target pointing right
Levels.121: Response - left hand (correct), incongruent flankers ('>><>>'), target pointing left
Levels.122: Response - left hand (error), incongruent flankers ('<<><<'), target pointing right
Levels.211: Response - right hand (error), congruent flankers ('<<<<<'), target pointing left
Levels.212: Response - right hand (correct), congruent flankers ('>>>>>'), target pointing right
Levels.221: Response - right hand (error), incongruent flankers ('>><>>'), target pointing left
Levels.222: Response - right hand (correct), incongruent flankers ('<<><<'), target pointing right
